{{Quote|People from the surrounding cities have been disappearing without a trace. At first we though it was some wild creature, until we found someone who escaped from the mines. They told us how slaves are being forced to mine spice at blaster point!|A commoner, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ac">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|a commoner|Rori}}</ref>}}
The '''Kobola Spice Mine''', also known as the '''Kobola Bunker''', was a cave located on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] moon of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the cave belonged to the [[Kobola Miners]] and was illegally mined for [[Spice/Legends|spice]].<ref name="SWG:KB" /> The Kobola Miners were a criminal organization that abducted travelers in the Naboo system and enslaved them yo do the mining work. That spice is then sold to the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].<ref name="CDHZ">{{SonyCite|url=players/guides.vm?id=80113|text=CorSec Database H-Z|int=CorSec Database H-Z}}</ref> The Kobola Spice Mine was also used as a bunker by the Kobola Miners and was carefully guarded.<ref name="SWG:KB" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a spacer managed to infiltrate the mine and stole a [[DE-10 blaster pistol/Legends|DE-10 blaster pistol]].<ref name="SWG:RPWMII">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Rare Pistol Weapons Mark II}}</ref>
